```{=html}
<div class="research-metrics">
  <div class="metric-card">
    <div class="metric-number">31</div>
    <div class="metric-label">Publications</div>
  </div>

  <div class="metric-card">
    <div class="metric-number">438</div>
    <div class="metric-label">Citations</div>
  </div>

  <div class="metric-card">
    <div class="metric-number">4</div>
    <div class="metric-label">Publication Years</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="publication-toolbar">
  <input
    type="text"
    id="publication-search"
    placeholder="Search by title, author, journal, or year..."
    onkeyup="filterPublications()"
  >
</div>
```

## 2026

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="controllability of the time-varying fractional dynamical systems having multiple delyas in control with caputo fractional derivative k. s. vishnukumar s. m. sivalingam v. govindaraj berna uzun ilker ozsahin hijaz ahmad taha radwan fractals 2026">
  <div class="publication-index">31</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">CONTROLLABILITY OF THE TIME-VARYING FRACTIONAL DYNAMICAL SYSTEMS HAVING MULTIPLE DELYAS IN CONTROL WITH CAPUTO FRACTIONAL DERIVATIVE</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">K. S. VISHNUKUMAR, <strong class="my-name">S. M. SIVALINGAM</strong>, V. GOVINDARAJ, BERNA UZUN, ILKER OZSAHIN, HIJAZ AHMAD, and TAHA RADWAN</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Fractals</em>, <strong>34</strong>(08) (2026)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1142/S0218348X26400025" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 1</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="controllability of time-varying stochastic fractional dynamical systems with distributed delays in control twinkle sanjay desai s m sivalingam v govindaraj communications on applied mathematics and computation 2026">
  <div class="publication-index">30</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Controllability of Time-Varying Stochastic Fractional Dynamical Systems with Distributed Delays in Control</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">Twinkle Sanjay Desai, <strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong>, and V Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Communications on Applied Mathematics and Computation</em> (2026)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s42967-025-00548-5" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="constrained physics informed deep implicit neural network for ordinary and partial differential equations s m sivalingam v. govindaraj shruti dubey mathematics and computers in simulation 2026">
  <div class="publication-index">29</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Constrained physics informed deep implicit neural network for ordinary and partial differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong>, V. Govindaraj, and Shruti Dubey</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Mathematics and Computers in Simulation</em>, <strong>241</strong>, 104-133 (2026)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.matcom.2025.08.006" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## 2025

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="neural fractional order differential equations s m sivalingam v. govindaraj expert systems with applications 2025">
  <div class="publication-index">28</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Neural fractional order differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong> and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Expert Systems with Applications</em>, <strong>267</strong>, 126041 (2025)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2024.126041" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 13</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="l1-predictor–corrector method for $$\psi $$-caputo type fractional differential equations s. m. sivalingam v. govindaraj j. vanterler da c. sousa a. s. hendy computational and applied mathematics 2025">
  <div class="publication-index">27</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">L1-predictor–corrector method for $$\psi $$-Caputo type fractional differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S. M. Sivalingam</strong>, V. Govindaraj, J. Vanterler da C. Sousa, and A. S. Hendy</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Computational and Applied Mathematics</em>, <strong>44</strong>(5) (2025)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s40314-025-03192-0" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 4</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="an improved physics informed neural network with theory of functional connections for fractional differential equations sm sivalingam v. govindaraj shruti dubey engineering analysis with boundary elements 2025">
  <div class="publication-index">26</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">An improved physics informed neural network with theory of functional connections for fractional differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">SM Sivalingam</strong>, V. Govindaraj, and Shruti Dubey</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Engineering Analysis with Boundary Elements</em>, <strong>178</strong>, 106281 (2025)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.enganabound.2025.106281" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 3</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="new results about controllability and stability of ψ-caputo-type stochastic fractional integro-differential systems with control delay a panneer selvam s m sivalingam v govindaraj physica scripta 2025">
  <div class="publication-index">25</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">New results about controllability and stability of ψ-Caputo-type stochastic fractional integro-differential systems with control delay</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">A Panneer Selvam, <strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong>, and V Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Physica Scripta</em>, <strong>100</strong>(2), 025233 (2025)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1402-4896/adaa33" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 2</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="controllability of time‐varying fractional dynamical systems with prescribed control p. karthiga s. m. sivalingam v. govindaraj mathematical methods in the applied sciences 2025">
  <div class="publication-index">24</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Controllability of time‐varying fractional dynamical systems with prescribed control</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">P. Karthiga, <strong class="my-name">S. M. Sivalingam</strong>, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Mathematical Methods in the Applied Sciences</em>, <strong>48</strong>(4), 4365-4384 (2025)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1002/mma.10552" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 2</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="solution representation and a generalised physics-informed neural network for $$\psi $$-caputo-type fractional time-varying systems s m sivalingam v. govindaraj nonlinear dynamics 2025">
  <div class="publication-index">23</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Solution representation and a generalised physics-informed neural network for $$\psi $$-Caputo-type fractional time-varying systems</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong> and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Nonlinear Dynamics</em>, <strong>113</strong>(15), 19125-19157 (2025)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11071-025-11181-5" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 1</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="spectral coefficient learning physics informed neural network for time-dependent fractional parametric differential problems sivalingam, s m v. govindaraj ahmed s. hendy arxiv (cornell university) 2025">
  <div class="publication-index">22</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Spectral coefficient learning physics informed neural network for time-dependent fractional parametric differential problems</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam, S M</strong>, V. Govindaraj, and Ahmed S. Hendy</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>arXiv (Cornell University)</em> (2025)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2503.22386" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="reachability of time‐varying fractional dynamical systems with prescribed control p. karthiga s. m. sivalingam v. govindaraj asian journal of control 2025">
  <div class="publication-index">21</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Reachability of time‐varying fractional dynamical systems with prescribed control</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">P. Karthiga, <strong class="my-name">S. M. Sivalingam</strong>, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Asian Journal of Control</em>, <strong>27</strong>(5), 2436-2447 (2025)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1002/asjc.3589" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## 2024

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="a novel optimization-based physics-informed neural network scheme for solving fractional differential equations sivalingam s m pushpendra kumar v. govindaraj engineering with computers 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">20</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">A novel optimization-based physics-informed neural network scheme for solving fractional differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong>, Pushpendra Kumar, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Engineering with Computers</em>, <strong>40</strong>(2), 855-865 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00366-023-01830-x" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 60</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="a novel numerical approach for time-varying impulsive fractional differential equations using theory of functional connections and neural network sivalingam sm v. govindaraj expert systems with applications 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">19</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">A novel numerical approach for time-varying impulsive fractional differential equations using theory of functional connections and neural network</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam SM</strong> and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Expert Systems with Applications</em>, <strong>238</strong>, 121750 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2023.121750" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 42</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="a chebyshev neural network-based numerical scheme to solve distributed-order fractional differential equations s.m. sivalingam pushpendra kumar v. govindaraj computers &amp;amp; mathematics with applications 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">18</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">A Chebyshev neural network-based numerical scheme to solve distributed-order fractional differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S.M. Sivalingam</strong>, Pushpendra Kumar, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Computers &amp;amp; Mathematics with Applications</em>, <strong>164</strong>, 150-165 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.camwa.2024.04.005" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 35</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="a novel l1-predictor-corrector method for the numerical solution of the generalized-caputo type fractional differential equations s m sivalingam pushpendra kumar hieu trinh v. govindaraj mathematics and computers in simulation 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">17</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">A novel L1-Predictor-Corrector method for the numerical solution of the generalized-Caputo type fractional differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong>, Pushpendra Kumar, Hieu Trinh, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Mathematics and Computers in Simulation</em>, <strong>220</strong>, 462-480 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.matcom.2024.01.017" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 27</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="forecasting of hiv/aids in south africa using 1990 to 2021 data: novel integer- and fractional-order fittings pushpendra kumar sivalingam s m v. govindaraj international journal of dynamics and control 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">16</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Forecasting of HIV/AIDS in South Africa using 1990 to 2021 data: novel integer- and fractional-order fittings</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">Pushpendra Kumar, <strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong>, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>International Journal of Dynamics and Control</em>, <strong>12</strong>(7), 2247-2263 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s40435-023-01344-w" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 23</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="physics informed neural network based scheme and its error analysis for &lt;i&gt;ψ&lt;/i&gt;-caputo type fractional differential equations s m sivalingam v govindaraj physica scripta 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">15</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Physics informed neural network based scheme and its error analysis for &lt;i&gt;ψ&lt;/i&gt;-Caputo type fractional differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong> and V Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Physica Scripta</em>, <strong>99</strong>(9), 096002 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1402-4896/ad6695" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 18</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="a novel method to approximate fractional differential equations based on the theory of functional connections sivalingam s m pushpendra kumar v. govindaraj numerical algorithms 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">14</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">A novel method to approximate fractional differential equations based on the theory of functional connections</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong>, Pushpendra Kumar, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Numerical Algorithms</em>, <strong>95</strong>(1), 527-549 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11075-023-01580-3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 16</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="observability of time-varying fractional dynamical systems with caputo fractional derivative s m sivalingam v. govindaraj mediterranean journal of mathematics 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">13</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Observability of Time-Varying Fractional Dynamical Systems with Caputo Fractional Derivative</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong> and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Mediterranean Journal of Mathematics</em>, <strong>21</strong>(3) (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00009-024-02615-2" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 14</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="some novel analyses of the caputo-type singular three-point fractional boundary value problems r. poovarasan pushpendra kumar s. m. sivalingam v. govindaraj the journal of analysis 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">12</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Some novel analyses of the Caputo-type singular three-point fractional boundary value problems</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">R. Poovarasan, Pushpendra Kumar, <strong class="my-name">S. M. Sivalingam</strong>, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>The Journal of Analysis</em>, <strong>32</strong>(2), 637-658 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s41478-023-00638-8" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 10</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="controllability of the time-varying fractional dynamical systems with a single delay in control k. s. vishnukumar s. m. sivalingam hijaz ahmad v. govindaraj nonlinear dynamics 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">11</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Controllability of the time-varying fractional dynamical systems with a single delay in control</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">K. S. Vishnukumar, <strong class="my-name">S. M. Sivalingam</strong>, Hijaz Ahmad, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Nonlinear Dynamics</em>, <strong>112</strong>(10), 8281-8297 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11071-024-09411-3" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 9</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="an operational matrix approach with vieta-fibonacci polynomial for solving generalized caputo fractal-fractional differential equations sivalingam s m pushpendra kumar v. govindaraj raed ali qahiti waleed hamali zico meetei mutum ain shams engineering journal 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">10</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">An operational matrix approach with Vieta-Fibonacci polynomial for solving generalized Caputo fractal-fractional differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong>, Pushpendra Kumar, V. Govindaraj, Raed Ali Qahiti, Waleed Hamali, and Zico Meetei Mutum</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Ain Shams Engineering Journal</em>, <strong>15</strong>(5), 102678 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.asej.2024.102678" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 8</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="controllability of time-varying fractional dynamical systems with distributed delays in control k s vishnukumar s m sivalingam v govindaraj physica scripta 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">9</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Controllability of time-varying fractional dynamical systems with distributed delays in control</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">K S Vishnukumar, <strong class="my-name">S M Sivalingam</strong>, and V Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Physica Scripta</em>, <strong>99</strong>(6), 065218 (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1088/1402-4896/ad4318" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 5</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="controllability of time-varying fractional dynamical systems s. m. sivalingam m. vellappandi v. govindaraj ibrahim alraddadi faisal alsharif hijaz ahmad journal of taibah university for science 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">8</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Controllability of time-varying fractional dynamical systems</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">S. M. Sivalingam</strong>, M. Vellappandi, V. Govindaraj, Ibrahim Alraddadi, Faisal Alsharif, and Hijaz Ahmad</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Journal of Taibah University for Science</em>, <strong>18</strong>(1) (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1080/16583655.2024.2399378" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 3</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="neural fractional order differential equations with adjoint based training sivalingam s m ssrn 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">7</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Neural Fractional Order Differential Equations with Adjoint Based Training</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong></div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>SSRN</em> (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="neural fractional order differential equations with adjoint based training sivalingam s m govindaraj v ssrn electronic journal 2024">
  <div class="publication-index">6</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Neural Fractional Order Differential Equations with Adjoint Based Training</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong> and Govindaraj V</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>SSRN Electronic Journal</em> (2024)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.2139/ssrn.4935725" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## 2023

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="a neural networks-based numerical method for the generalized caputo-type fractional differential equations sivalingam s m pushpendra kumar venkatesan govindaraj mathematics and computers in simulation 2023">
  <div class="publication-index">5</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">A neural networks-based numerical method for the generalized Caputo-type fractional differential equations</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong>, Pushpendra Kumar, and Venkatesan Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Mathematics and Computers in Simulation</em>, <strong>213</strong>, 302-323 (2023)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.matcom.2023.06.012" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 50</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="a case study of monkeypox disease in the united states using mathematical modeling with real data pushpendra kumar m. vellappandi zareen a. khan sivalingam s m anthony kaziboni v. govindaraj mathematics and computers in simulation 2023">
  <div class="publication-index">4</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">A case study of monkeypox disease in the United States using mathematical modeling with real data</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">Pushpendra Kumar, M. Vellappandi, Zareen A. Khan, <strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong>, Anthony Kaziboni, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Mathematics and Computers in Simulation</em>, <strong>213</strong>, 444-465 (2023)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.matcom.2023.06.016" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 40</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="a novel numerical scheme for fractional differential equations using extreme learning machine sivalingam s m pushpendra kumar v. govindaraj physica a: statistical mechanics and its applications 2023">
  <div class="publication-index">3</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">A novel numerical scheme for fractional differential equations using extreme learning machine</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong>, Pushpendra Kumar, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Physica A: Statistical Mechanics and its Applications</em>, <strong>622</strong>, 128887 (2023)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.physa.2023.128887" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 31</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="the hybrid average subtraction and standard deviation based optimizer sivalingam s m pushpendra kumar v. govindaraj advances in engineering software 2023">
  <div class="publication-index">2</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">The hybrid average subtraction and standard deviation based optimizer</div>

    <div class="publication-authors"><strong class="my-name">Sivalingam S M</strong>, Pushpendra Kumar, and V. Govindaraj</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>Advances in Engineering Software</em>, <strong>176</strong>, 103387 (2023)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.advengsoft.2022.103387" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 21</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="publication-card" data-search="implementation of statistical techniques to analyze agriculture data sivalingam vinitha vijayan ganesh nair athira sindhu karyankandi puthanpurayil sowmya adapa sahithi pesala vijayalakshmi chellappa aip conference proceedings 2023">
  <div class="publication-index">1</div>

  <div class="publication-content">
    <div class="publication-title">Implementation of statistical techniques to analyze agriculture data</div>

    <div class="publication-authors">Sivalingam, Vinitha Vijayan, Ganesh Nair, Athira, Sindhu Karyankandi Puthanpurayil, Sowmya Adapa, Sahithi Pesala, and Vijayalakshmi Chellappa</div>

    <div class="publication-journal"><em>AIP Conference Proceedings</em>, <strong>2797</strong>, 070004 (2023)</div>

    <div class="publication-actions">
      <a class="publication-button" href="https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0149053" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>
      <span class="citation-button citation-disabled">Cited by 0</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>
function filterPublications() {
  const input =
    document.getElementById("publication-search");

  const filter =
    input.value.toLowerCase().trim();

  const cards =
    document.querySelectorAll(".publication-card");

  cards.forEach(function(card) {
    const text =
      (card.dataset.search || "").toLowerCase();

    card.style.display =
      text.includes(filter) ? "" : "none";
  });

  document.querySelectorAll("h2").forEach(
    function(heading) {

      const yearPattern =
        /^\d{4}$|^Undated$/;

      if (
        !yearPattern.test(
          heading.textContent.trim()
        )
      ) {
        return;
      }

      let next =
        heading.nextElementSibling;

      let visiblePublication = false;

      while (
        next
        && next.tagName !== "H2"
      ) {
        if (
          next.classList
          && next.classList.contains(
            "publication-card"
          )
          && next.style.display !== "none"
        ) {
          visiblePublication = true;
        }

        next = next.nextElementSibling;
      }

      heading.style.display =
        visiblePublication ? "" : "none";
    }
  );
}
</script>
```
